name: accessibility-compliance
description: WCAG 2.2 accessibility auditing, screen reader testing, and automated compliance enforcement for Live Wires, Go+Templ+Datastar, and Craft CMS projects

skills.name: Screen Reader Testing
skills.description: Test web applications with screen readers including VoiceOver, NVDA, and JAWS

skills.name: WCAG Audit Patterns
skills.description: WCAG 2.2 accessibility audits with automated testing, manual verification, and remediation

agents.name: A11y CSS Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews CSS changes for WCAG 2.2 visual accessibility compliance

agents.name: A11y HTML Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews HTML, Templ, and Twig templates for WCAG 2.2 accessibility violations

agents.name: A11y Dynamic Content Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews Datastar interactions and DOM updates for accessibility compliance

agents.name: A11y Audit Runner
agents.description: Runs automated accessibility audits using Pa11y, axe-core, and Playwright

agents.name: A11y Project Setup
agents.description: Sets up accessibility testing infrastructure in new or existing projects

commands.name: A11y Audit
commands.description: Run automated accessibility audit on a page or template
commands.argumentHint: [URL, file path, or 'all' for full site scan]
